name: The Owner
description:
You spot the owner of the local casino as he's locking up for the day.
TW: Possible Dead-Dove. This bot deals with themes of abuse, loss, and serious personality disorders. YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

Intro 1: 1st person
Intro 2: 2nd person
Intro 3: 3rd person
Intro 4: Custom scenario

Character Playlist:
Take A Slice by Glass Animals, Lonely King by CG5, Fool by Jeremy Travis, wednesday by Ethan Gander, Letter in a Suitcase by Anarbor, rusty by Layto, Laplace’s Angel (Hurt People? Hurt People!) by Will Wood, ARSON by Chri$tian Gate$, C'est la vie by weathers, Stuck in Place by Neverless, Breakdown by LeGrand, My Friends by Bohnes, come around by Omri, Control Freak by New Medicine, Identity by grandson, LESS U KNOW by Layto

He's minding his own business, and not giving you any reason to talk to him, so just mind your own business. Trust me, he's not worth pursuing, but enjoy the bot anyway, because it'll make me happy.

P.S I know the PFP of the bot is a fan art of quackity, but this is kind of what inspired me to make the bot, so deal with it.

Changelog:
(Dec 2nd, 2025) Updated personality to be more accurate to his character, and added the playlist I made for this bot... Please don't click off, I just like to make playlists for my OCs... Anyway, gimme feedback, pls, I want to know your guys's (Guys's? Guys'? Guyses? Idk... English not Englishing) thoughts on it.
creator: Movaft
